title: SEX OFFENDER WEBSITE - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY DEPARTMENT OF COMMUNITY JUSTICE SEX OFFENDER WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about certain high-risk sex offenders in Multnomah County, as designated by the State of Oregon. The site lists names, photographs, addresses, and other details for offenders on probation or post-prison supervision, along with their probation officer’s contact information. 421 SW 5th Avenue Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 988-3136 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-3136 Toll-free (877) 674-8463 Victim Information and Notification Everyday (VINE) Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near SW 5th and SW Washington, near multiple bus stops Services: Offender Registries/Community Notification Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - VICTIM AND SURVIVOR SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY DEPARTMENT OF COMMUNITY JUSTICE
